reviews.comment:
Me toco de ida y de vuelta. Fui a las termas. Pare en dicha estacion de servicio. Y me ocurrio. Que. Hay muy poco personal. Ademas muy pero muy lento el despacho de combustibles. Lastima. Ya que tendrian que respetar a los consumidores

(Translated by Google)
I had to stop there on my way to and from the hot springs. I stopped at that gas station, and what happened was that there were very few staff members. Also, the fuel service was extremely slow. It's a shame, because they should respect their customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndWNtQ1dREAE

reviews.comment:
Todo bien. Habitación comoda, cama excelente. Un poco ruidoso por la proximidad de la estación de servicio y del motor de la bomba de agua.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine. Comfortable room, excellent bed. A little noisy due to the proximity of the gas station and the water pump engine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReDl5N1VnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, pocas islas de carga o poco personal. Paciencia al cargar

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, but few charging stations or insufficient staff. Patience is required while charging.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMkt5bndBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es la mejor opción para parar en la zona pero siempre hay mucha gente y la atención es lerda y a las apuradas...le falta personal atendiendo

(Translated by Google)
It's the best place to stop in the area, but it's always crowded and the service is slow and rushed...they're understaffed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNXRpUmNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños estan siempre limpios lo que no siempre ocurre en nuestro pais. Y el servicio de bar en muy bueno

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are always clean, which isn't always the case in our country. And the bar service is very good.

reviews.comment:
Malísima atención!!! No informan los surtidores!!!!!!
Media hora de espera para que te digan ese no carga nafta teniendo la cartelería incorrecta

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service!!! They don't show you which pumps are working!
Half an hour's wait only to be told that pump isn't dispensing fuel, even though the signage is incorrect.
